# function: pluscode_decode

Parses a full Open Location Code and returns its centre, bounding box, and original length. Errors on short codes (those that need a reference location); pre-extend short codes with `olc.RecoverNearest` upstream of Terraform if you need to ingest them.

## Example Usage

```terraform
// Decode a full Plus code into centre + bounding box. Short codes (those that need a reference location) are not supported here — pre-extend them upstream of Terraform.
output "civic_center_decoded" {
  value = provider::burnham::pluscode_decode("849VQHFJ+X6")
  // → { latitude = …, longitude = …, lat_min/max = …, lon_min/max = …, length = 10 }
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
pluscode_decode(code string) object
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `code` (String) The Plus code to decode (full code, including the `+`).
